scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='client/dist'; const dest='build'; if(fs.existsSync(src)){if(fs.existsSync(dest))fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true}); console.log('Build output:',dest);}else{console.log('Build output: missing'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.dev: concurrently "node server/index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
